title: Douluo Dalu II: Jueshi Tangmen

alternative_titles.en: Soul Land 2: The Peerless Tang Clan

synopsis:
This place has no magic, no battle aura, no martial arts, but there are Martial Souls. On the Douluo Continent, ten thousand years after the founding of the Tang Sect, the Tang Sect has declined. A new generation of geniuses emerges, can the new Shrek Seven Devils revive the Tang Sect and compose an epic song of the Tang Sect? Million-year-old soul beasts, the Necromancer Saint God who grasps the sun and moon and plucks stars from the sky, and a brand-new soul tool system that led to the Tang Sect's decline. All the wonders will be revealed. Can the Tang Sect's hidden weapons regain their former glory? Can the Tang Sect reappear in its former splendor?

(Source: Tencent, translated)
